phase: Phase 7: CVE Regression + Phase 8: Novel Finding Deep-Dive

findings.name: backend_injection
findings.details:
BARE LF HEADER INJECTION CONFIRMED!
Backend sees 'Injected: evil' as separate header
Headers: {
  "host": "127.0.0.1:8180",
  "x-test": "before",
  "injected": "evil",
  "x-forwarded-proto": "http",
  "x-real-ip": "127.0.0.1",
  "x-frontend": "http",
  "x-lua-processed": "true",
  "x-lua-method": "GET",
  "x-lua-path": "/",
  "x-lua-ua-echo": ""
}

findings.name: inject_transfer_encoding
findings.details:
Bare LF + TE injection: TE INJECTED!
Headers: {
  "host": "127.0.0.1:8180",
  "x-test": "before",
  "transfer-encoding": "chunked",
  "x-forwarded-proto": "http",
  "x-real-ip": "127.0.0.1",
  "x-frontend": "http",
  "x-lua-processed": "true",
  "x-lua-method": "GET",
  "x-lua-path": "/",
  "x-lua-ua-echo": ""
}

findings.name: multiple_injections
findings.details:
Multiple bare LF: inject1=True, inject2=True
Headers: {
  "host": "127.0.0.1:8180",
  "x-test": "val1",
  "x-inject1": "a",
  "x-inject2": "b",
  "x-forwarded-proto": "http",
  "x-real-ip": "127.0.0.1",
  "x-frontend": "http",
  "x-lua-processed": "true",
  "x-lua-method": "GET",
  "x-lua-path": "/",
  "x-lua-ua-echo": ""
}

findings.name: overlong_varint_ub
findings.details:
CONFIRMED: hpack-dec.c:55-87 get_var_int() accepts overlong varint encoding
shift variable (uint8_t) reaches 210+ bits without bounds check
((uint32_t)(*raw++) & 127) << shift is UB when shift >= 32 (C11 §6.5.7)
CWE-190 (Integer Overflow), CWE-758 (Reliance on Undefined Behavior)
Impact: Compiler-dependent; may cause wrong decoded values with -O2+

raw_data.exploitable_o2: UNKNOWN - compiler may optimize based on UB assumption

findings.name: inverted_cid_check
findings.details:
CONFIRMED: quic_tp.c:171 preferred_address CID length check INVERTED
Code: if (end - sizeof(stateless_reset_token) - *buf > addr->cid.len)
Should be: if (end - sizeof(stateless_reset_token) - *buf < addr->cid.len)
Impact: Buffer overflow when HAProxy acts as QUIC CLIENT
Note: SERVER-SIDE only (this is a parameter HAProxy sends, not receives)
Affects: HAProxy connecting to upstream QUIC backends

raw_data.prereq: HAProxy must connect to malicious QUIC backend

tests.name: source_audit
tests.details:
PATCHED: mjson.h:46 defines MJSON_MAX_DEPTH=20
Phase 5 deep nesting tests timed out (Lua endpoint doesn't parse POST body)
The DoS path requires a response body processed by mjson, not a request

tests.name: truncated_varint_recovery
tests.details:
After truncated varint QUIC packet: HTTP 200
HAProxy recovered — PATCHED

tests.name: source_and_dynamic
tests.details:
PATCHED: quic_rx.c validates token_len against remaining buffer
Phase 4 tested 8 underflow vectors — all rejected correctly
